name: Cody Harris

contactInfo.office: Texas Capitol Extension, Room E2.410, Austin, TX 78701

bio: Cody Harris represents House District 8 in the Texas House of Representatives, serving Nacogdoches, Rusk, Panola, Shelby, Freestone, Leon, and Limestone counties. A rancher and small business owner from Palestine, Harris has served in the legislature since 2019. He focuses on protecting rural landowner rights, supporting the timber and energy industries, and promoting conservative fiscal policy.
campaignPromises: Protect private property rights and oppose eminent domain abuse
Support the East Texas timber and energy industries
Lower property taxes for rural landowners
Expand rural broadband and healthcare access
Stand firm on Second Amendment protections
